title: correa lawrenciana var. cordifolia
intro: Correa lawrenciana var. cordifolia, also known as the cord-leaf correa, is a shrub native to Australia that belongs to the Rutaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as aiding in digestion, reducing fever, and providing relief from respiratory issues. The cord-leaf correa can be used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use should be guided by a qualified healthcare professional.
